annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under RSA 336:1, II — 5.7% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from New Hampshire’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-01-01; verify at courts.nh.gov. Not legal advice.
